title: Ethan Doan
text:
About Me
Hi, I’m Ethan. I’m a student at William & Mary studying science, with a strong interest in biochemistry and how it connects to real-world problems. I enjoy breaking down complex ideas and understanding how things work at a deeper level.
Outside of academics, I’m always looking for ways to learn, improve, and take on new challenges. This site is a place where I share my work, interests, and things I’m building along the way.

title: Lab Notebook
text:
Welcome to my open lab notebook!
This is a cataloged and searchable collection of research notes and findings.

title: Lab Notebook
text:
How to Explore This Notebook

Search: Use the search box to find entries by keywords
Filter by Category: Click on categories to filter entries by project or topic
Sort: Sort entries by date, title, or other criteria
Browse: Scroll through all entries in chronological order
